title: CreateCallRequest
description: CreateCallRequest schema from Bandwidth voice API

from.description: The Bandwidth phone number that will make the outbound call, in E.164 format

to.description: The destination phone number for the outbound call, in E.164 format

answerUrl.description: The URL to send the answer webhook to when the call is answered. The endpoint should return BXML to control the call flow.

answerMethod.description: The HTTP method to use for the answer webhook

answerFallbackUrl.description: Fallback URL for the answer webhook if the primary URL fails

answerFallbackMethod.description: The HTTP method for the fallback answer webhook

disconnectUrl.description: The URL to send the disconnect webhook to when the call ends

disconnectMethod.description: The HTTP method for the disconnect webhook

applicationId.description: The ID of the Bandwidth application associated with this call

tag.description: A custom string to attach to the call for tracking purposes

callTimeout.description: The timeout in seconds for the outbound call to be answered

callbackTimeout.description: The timeout in seconds for webhook callback requests
